advancements.smprpg.mining.root.title: Mining
Sticks and Planks May Break These Stones...
Obtain a Wooden Pickaxe, allowing you to mine the first tier of metal ores.
advancements.smprpg.mining.tin_tools.des: Obtain a Tin Pickaxe, a moderately fortunate but slow pickaxe.
Obtain a Copper Pickaxe, a decent all-rounder pickaxe.
Obtain a Silver Pickaxe, a fast, fortunate, and very fragile pickaxe.
advancements.smprpg.mining.gold_tools.de: Obtain a Golden Pickaxe, a faster, more fortunate, and slightly less fragile pickaxe.
advancements.smprpg.mining.rose_gold_too: Alloy Copper and Gold Ingots to obtain Rose Gold, and get the best of both worlds.
Alloy Copper and Tin Ingots to obtain Bronze, a slow, but very fortunate material.
advancements.smprpg.mining.iron_tools.de: Obtain an Iron Pickaxe, a good all-rounder pickaxe.
advancements.smprpg.mining.blast_furnace: Craft a Blast Furnace, used to process higher quality metals.
advancements.smprpg.mining.steel_tools.d: Obtain a Steel Pickaxe, a good all-rounder pickaxe.
advancements.smprpg.mining.mithril_tools: From the Middle of the Earth
Obtain a Mithril Pickaxe, a very fast but very low fortune pickaxe.
advancements.smprpg.mining.titanium_tool: Mine Titanium from the heart of a Mithril cluster and obtain a Titanium Pickaxe
advancements.smprpg.mining.adamantium_to: Obtain Adamantium, the ultimate Overworld material.
Obtain a Cobalt Pickaxe, a very fast and moderately fortunate pickaxe.
advancements.smprpg.mining.orichalcum_to: Obtain an Orichalcum Pickaxe, a fortunate, but not very fast pickaxe.
advancements.smprpg.mining.netherite_too: Alloy Netherite Scrap and Gold to obtain a Netherite Pickaxe, a very good all-rounder pickaxe.
advancements.smprpg.mining.palladium_too: Obtain a Palladium Pickaxe, a fairly fast and moderately fortunate pickaxe.
advancements.smprpg.mining.platinum_tool: Obtain a Platinum Pickaxe, a fairly fast and very fortunate pickaxe.
advancements.smprpg.mining.aetherium_too: Alloy Gravitite Shards and Silver to obtain an Aetherium Pickaxe, the fastest available pickaxe.
advancements.smprpg.mining.dragonsteel_t: Alloy Dragon Scales and Steel to obtain a Dragonsteel Pickaxe, the best all-rounder pickaxe.
